content_of_post_to_comment: A lesson I learned the hard way: Not everyone who stands beside you is standing with you. Some people love your loyalty. Some people love your help. Some people love your support. Pay attention to who loves your success too. That difference will save you years of confusion.
comment: A subtle distinction might be between people who struggle with your success and people who simply don’t know how to relate to it anymore. Not all distance is betrayal, but it’s worth noticing the difference.
